lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Drunken man
lines.text: ... whassup?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you alright?

lines.speaker: Drunken man
lines.text: ... see... two of you... why there two of you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: There's only one of me, friend.

lines.speaker: Drunken man
lines.text: ... no, two of you... you can't count... ... maybe you drunk too much...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Whatever you say, friend.

lines.speaker: Drunken man
lines.text: ... giant hairy cabbages...

sections.title: If the Falador Party Room drop chest is at least 50,000 coins in Grand Exchange value in a free-to-play world or 76,000 coins in Grand Exchange value in a members world
If the lever has not been pulled

lines.speaker: Drunken man
lines.text: Have you heard? Someone's planning a big party!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: Drunken man
lines.text: Someone's put something very valuable into the party room drop chest! If you go to the party room and pull the lever you might have a chance to get it!

lines.speaker: Drunken man
lines.text: It could be your lucky day!

sections.title: If the lever has been pulled

lines.speaker: Drunken man
lines.text: You should get to the party room right now! There's a big drop in progress!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: Drunken man
lines.text: Someone's put something very valuable into the party room drop and the pulled the lever. If you burst the balloons in the party room you might have a chance of getting it!

lines.speaker: Drunken man
lines.text: You never know, it could be your lucky day!

sections.title: When the Party Room chest contains more than 50,000 or 76,000 coins in Grand Exchange value (on a F2P or members' world respectively)

lines.speaker: Drunken man
lines.text: Party! Party!

lines.speaker: Drunken man
lines.text: Something's happening in the party room!

lines.speaker: Drunken man
lines.text: Everyone get to the party room!

lines.speaker: Drunken man
lines.text: What's happening in the party room?

lines.speaker: Drunken man
lines.text: Someone's having a big party!

lines.speaker: Drunken man
lines.text: Get to the party room NOW!

lines.speaker: Drunken man
lines.text: Get to the party room!

lines.speaker: Drunken man
lines.text: Get to the party room quick!

lines.speaker: Drunken man
lines.text: Big value items in the party room now!

lines.speaker: Drunken man
lines.text: Quick! Get to the party room!
